claim: Gemini Embedding 2 is the first natively multimodal embedding model supporting text, images, audio (without transcription), video (up to 2 minutes), and PDFs in a single shared vector space
actionable: Replace separate embedding pipelines with Gemini Embedding 2 for multimodal RAG—a single embedding, index, and query now handles multiple content types.
source_title: Gemini Embedding 2 - Audio, Text, Images, Docs, Videos

claim: The model incorporates Matryoshka representation learning (MRL), allowing flexible output dimensions (full 3072, half, or quarter size) for speed and storage trade-offs
actionable: Use smaller embedding dimensions when semantic precision is less critical to reduce storage and query latency without losing semantic coherence.
source_title: Gemini Embedding 2 - Audio, Text, Images, Docs, Videos

claim: Text is limited to 8,000 tokens, 6 images, and 2-minute videos per call; chunk longer content (e.g., hour-long lectures into 15-30 second video chunks) for fine-grained search
actionable: Design chunking strategies based on your search granularity needs—smaller chunks enable more precise time/context location at the cost of more embeddings.
source_title: Gemini Embedding 2 - Audio, Text, Images, Docs, Videos

claim: You can pass multiple modalities together (e.g., image + text description) in a single request to get an aggregated embedding representing the combination
actionable: For rich multimodal queries, combine text descriptions with image/audio samples in one embedding call to capture joint semantics.
source_title: Gemini Embedding 2 - Audio, Text, Images, Docs, Videos

claim: Multimodal RAG previously required multiple vector stores, models, and reranking layers; now a single unified embedding space simplifies architecture and reduces maintenance cost
actionable: Consolidate existing multimodal pipelines into a single Gemini Embedding 2 deployment to reduce operational complexity and improve search consistency.
source_title: Gemini Embedding 2 - Audio, Text, Images, Docs, Videos

claim: Integration with LangChain, LlamaIndex, ChromaDB, and Qdrant was available on day zero of release, reducing barrier to adoption
actionable: Start using Gemini Embedding 2 through existing framework integrations without needing custom client implementations.
source_title: Gemini Embedding 2 - Audio, Text, Images, Docs, Videos
